initial_draft:
Okay, I'm Player BLUE. Let's analyze this situation. Player RED starts with $100 and is offering me $10. I currently have $0. Accepting this trade would give me $10. Rejecting means we both lose everything. Since I have nothing to lose by accepting, and $10 is better than $0, I'll accept.

```
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering $10, which is better than having $0. Rejecting means we both lose everything. I will accept the trade. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Accepting the trade! </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
